projectDescription: A fully local, open-source voice-to-text tool that acts as a system-wide AI dictation layer, converting speech into clean, formatted text using Whisper.cpp for ASR and a fine-tuned Qwen 3 LLM for cleanup.
keyFeatures: Fully local processing — no data leaves your machine
Native overlay capsule UI showing recording/transcribing state on Linux and macOS
Whisper.cpp ASR with Whisper Small or Large v3 Turbo models
Fine-tuned Qwen 3 LLM for smart cleanup of filler words and self-corrections
System-wide text injection into any application
Global hotkey support with Push-to-Talk and Toggle modes
Wayland support via UNIX socket trigger server
Settings window with live model switching, language selection, and hotkey reconfiguration
Headless CLI mode (--no-ui) for scripting and low-resource environments
Companion sussurro-transcribe CLI for batch audio file transcription
publicApiSurface: config.yaml: app, audio, models.asr, models.llm, hotkey, injection sections
SUSSURRO_* environment variable overrides for all config keys
